featuresHeading: Everything you need for the circular economy

feature1Description: Buy and sell recyclable materials between professionals on our B2B marketplace. Smart matching connects sellers with buyers based on material type, location and volume.

feature3Description: Calculate your carbon footprint and generate CSR reports automatically. AI-powered analytics help you meet regulatory requirements worldwide.
blockchainDescription: Every step of the material journey is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable chain of custody from source to final recycling destination.
blockchainStep1: Lot registration with unique hash and complete documentation
blockchainStep2: GPS geolocation and precise timestamping of each movement
blockchainStep3: Detailed documentation of processes and involved parties
blockchainStep4: Certification of final destination and measured impact

csrDescription: Our artificial intelligence analyzes your data in real-time to generate CSR reports compliant with international standards. Visualize your carbon footprint and identify areas for improvement.
csrStep1: Automatic carbon footprint calculation per transaction
csrStep2: CSR reports compliant with CSRD, SEC climate rules and global standards
csrStep4: AI recommendations to reduce your impact

studyCaseQuote: GreenEcoGenius revolutionized our recyclable materials management. Blockchain traceability and automated reporting gave us unprecedented transparency and efficiency.

ctaHeading: Ready to accelerate your circular transition?
ctaSubheading: Join hundreds of businesses already reducing waste and creating value from recyclable materials.
aboutPageSubtitle: Our mission is to make the circular economy accessible to businesses worldwide.
aboutMissionText: GreenEcoGenius was born from a simple observation: the circular economy cannot grow without powerful digital tools. Our mission is to provide businesses with a complete platform to sell, buy and trace their recyclable materials, while measuring and reducing their carbon footprint.
aboutVisionText: We envision a world where every piece of industrial waste finds a second life. A world where traceability is total, transparency is the norm, and every business actively contributes to the ecological transition through cutting-edge technology.
aboutClimateText: Globally, over 2.5 billion tons of industrial waste are generated every year. Less than 40% is effectively recycled. The rest ends up in landfills or is exported, contributing massively to greenhouse gas emissions. GreenEcoGenius directly tackles this challenge by connecting the actors of the circular value chain across Europe and North America.
aboutGreentechText: Our platform combines the most advanced technologies: artificial intelligence for matching and reporting, blockchain for traceability, and real-time data analytics. We continuously invest in R&D to stay at the forefront of global GreenTech innovation.
aboutCsrText: Corporate Social Responsibility is at the core of our DNA. We help our clients comply with the CSRD directive, generate their extra-financial reports and demonstrate their environmental commitment to their stakeholders.
aboutStructureP1: GreenEcoGenius operates through two complementary entities:
aboutStructureEU: GreenEcoGenius OÜ, registered in Estonia, operates the platform for the European market. Estonia is a global leader in digital governance and provides a modern legal framework for tech companies.
aboutStructureUS: GreenEcoGenius, Inc., incorporated in Delaware (USA), leads our North American operations. Delaware is the gold standard for technology startups in the United States.
aboutStructureFounder: Both entities share a single founder, Ervis Ago, uniting European regulatory expertise with US innovation infrastructure.
aboutCarbonText: Every transaction on GreenEcoGenius comes with a precise calculation of its carbon impact. Our AI measures avoided emissions through recycling and logistics optimization, allowing our clients to concretely quantify their contribution to the fight against climate change.
faq1Answer: Le Comptoir Circulaire is a B2B marketplace where professionals can buy and sell recyclable materials. Think of it as a stock exchange for industrial waste.
faq2Answer: Every material transaction is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable chain of custody from source to final recycling destination.
faq3Question: Is the platform free to use?
faq3Answer: Creating an account is free. We charge a small commission on successful transactions, so you only pay when you make a deal.
faq4Question: What types of materials can I trade?
faq4Answer: Metals, plastics, paper, cardboard, glass, textiles, wood, and electronic waste. We're constantly adding new material categories.
faq5Question: How does the AI carbon calculator work?
faq5Answer: Our AI analyzes your transactions and logistics data to calculate your carbon footprint in real-time, then automatically generates CSR reports compliant with international standards (CSRD, GHG Protocol, GRI).
faq6Question: Can I integrate with my existing ERP?
faq6Answer: Yes, we offer REST APIs and webhooks to connect with SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics and other popular ERP systems.
faq7Question: Which countries do you operate in?
faq7Answer: We operate across the European Union and North America, with ongoing expansion to the UK, Switzerland, and additional markets.
faq8Question: How do you verify material quality?
faq8Answer: We use a combination of seller certification, lab testing partnerships, and buyer feedback to ensure material quality standards.
faq9Answer: We are fully GDPR and CCPA compliant. Data is stored in regional data centers (EU for European users, US-compliant infrastructure for North American users) and encrypted at rest and in transit.
contactFaq: If you can't find what you're looking for, contact our team.

footerDescription: B2B circular economy platform. Sell, collect and trace recyclable materials with blockchain traceability and AI-powered CSR reporting.

serviceRecyclerDesc: Buy and sell recyclable materials between professionals on our B2B marketplace. Our Smart Matching algorithm connects sellers and buyers by material type, location and volume.
serviceTracerDesc: Track every material end-to-end with the Polygon blockchain. Total transparency and immutable records for your entire supply chain.
serviceMesurerDesc: Calculate your carbon footprint and generate CSR reports automatically. Our AI analyzes your data in real time for reports compliant with international standards (CSRD, GHG Protocol, GRI).
serviceReduireDesc: Identify hidden value in your material flows. Our platform provides a concrete action plan to reduce your waste by up to 45%.
serviceOptimiserDesc: Reduce your logistics costs by up to 30% with our shared collection and transport network. AI-powered route optimization and real-time tracking.
serviceConnecterDesc: Integrate GreenEcoGenius into your existing ERP via our REST APIs and webhooks. Compatible with SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics and other popular systems.
normesDesc: 42 standards, regulations and frameworks integrated into our platform to ensure your compliance.
normesSubDesc: GreenEcoGenius is the only B2B circular economy platform that natively integrates ISO standards, international regulations, and ESG reporting frameworks into every feature.
solDesc: From the marketplace to ESG reporting, every module works together to automate your circular transition.
solMarketplaceDesc: Buy, sell and collect recyclable materials between professionals. Our Smart Matching algorithm connects the right partners instantly.
solMarketplaceF1: Smart matching by material, volume and location
solMarketplaceF3: CO2 impact calculated automatically per transaction
solTraceDesc: Each lot is recorded on the blockchain with an immutable SHA-256 hash. Anti-greenwashing proof verifiable by QR code.
solTraceF2: PDF certificates with verifiable QR code
solCarbonDesc: Measure your emissions with ADEME factors. AI guides your input and generates personalized reduction recommendations.
solEsgDesc: Generate reports compliant with international standards (CSRD, GRI, GHG Protocol). 42 fields auto-filled from your platform data, 6 remaining to complete.
solEsgF2: CSRD, GRI Standards, GHG Protocol formats
solEsgF3: Interactive CSRD table with 12 ESRS standards
solComplianceDesc: Compliance pre-audit in 6 parallel AI calls. CSR diagnostic with eligibility for B Corp, Lucie 26000, Label NR labels.
solComplianceF2: CSR diagnostic with score and roadmap
solComplianceF3: Continuous regulatory monitoring and automatic alerts
solLabelsDesc: Instantly assess your eligibility for major environmental labels and CSR certifications. Our AI analyzes your profile and generates a personalized action plan for each targeted label.
solLabelsF1: B Corp, Lucie 26000, GreenTech, Label NR eligibility
